have key : ∀ k : ℝ, k ≠ 0 → k * Real.sinh (r / k) = Real.sinh (r * k⁻¹) / k⁻¹ := by
    intros k hk
    field_simp
  have h_inv : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k⁻¹) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
    · exact tendsto_inv_atTop_zero
    · filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
      exact inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)
  have h_eq : ∀ᶠ k in atTop, k * Real.sinh (r / k) = Real.sinh (r * k⁻¹) / k⁻¹ := by
    filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
    field_simp
  apply Tendsto.congr' h_eq.symm
  exact (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp h_inv

simp only [one_div]
    exact tendsto_inv_atTop_zero
  have h2 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh x / x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) := Real.tendsto_sinh_div_self
  have h3 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => r / k) atTop (𝓝 0) := by
    have : (fun k : ℝ => r / k) = (fun k => r * (1 / k)) := by ext; ring
    rw [this]
    exact Tendsto.const_mul r h1
  have h4 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r / k) / (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 1) := h2.comp h3
  have h5 : ∀ᶠ k : ℝ in atTop, k * Real.sinh (r / k) = r * (Real.sinh (r / k) / (r / k)) := by
    filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
    field_simp
    ring
  refine Tendsto.congr' h5 ?_
  calc Tendsto (fun k => r * (Real.sinh (r / k) / (r / k))) atTop (𝓝 (r * 1)) := h4.const_mul r
    _ = Tendsto (fun k => r * (Real.sinh (r / k) / (r / k))) atTop (𝓝 r) := by ring_nf
